CommunityApplications.Profile: Self-hosted AI workspace - chat, agents, deep research, documents, email, calendar, and model Cookbook. Built by pewdiepie-archdaemon. This repository provides the main Odysseus app along with branded companion templates (ChromaDB, SearXNG, ntfy) that are pre-configured to work together out of the box. A docker-compose.yml is also available for one-click stack deployment via the Compose Manager plugin.
